KmsConfiguration.description: Contains the KMS configuration for a resource.

KeyType.description: The type of KMS key (CustomerManagedKey or ServiceManagedKey).
KeyType.markdownDescription:
The type of KMS key (CustomerManagedKey or ServiceManagedKey).

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: CustomerManagedKey | ServiceManagedKey  
Update requires: No interruption

KmsKeyArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the KMS key.
KmsKeyArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the KMS key.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Pattern: ^arn:aws(|-cn|-us-gov):kms:[a-zA-Z0-9-]*:[0-9]{12}:key/[a-zA-Z0-9-]{36}$  
Update requires: No interruption

KmsConfiguration.markdownDescription:
Contains the KMS configuration for a resource.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

TokenVaultId.description: The unique identifier of the token vault.
TokenVaultId.markdownDescription:
The unique identifier of the token vault.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 64  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9\-_]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Arn.description: The ARN of the token vault.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the token vault.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:[a-z0-9-\.]{1,63}:[a-z0-9-\.]{0,63}:[a-z0-9-\.]{0,63}:[a-z0-9-\.]{0,63}:[^/].{0,1023}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
